subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Name through which the Sun of Grandeur and Eternity hath shone forth from the horizon of heaven [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الذی به اشرقت شمس العظمه و البقا عن افق سماء
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @nearness and remoteness
